positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical cosmic creature—a glowing, bio-luminescent fox wrapped in nebula tails, floating among stylized constellations and crystalline planets. The composition should be a central, impactful silhouette, emphasizing negative space and strong, contrasting outlines. Color palette: Deep indigo, cosmic sapphire blue, magenta, and electric lime green highlights. Art style: Clean vector illustration merged with detailed ethereal watercolor wash, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Lighting: High contrast, glowing from within the creature and stars. Print-friendly details: Isolated design on a solid background.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, copyright, dirty, grainy, poor anatomy, low resolution, extra limbs, muted, grayscale
